issues.description: Condition missing: 'If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards' must be encoded as a condition. Current condition is 'Always' which ignores the life card comparison requirement.
DrawCard is conditional on life comparison, but no conditional branch exists in the DSL. The draw should only occur if the life condition is met.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' is invalid and has no justification in the card text. The ability is a single Activate: Main action, not two separate triggers.
Rest action missing 'upTo' modifier. Card text states 'rest up to 1' (optional), but DSL does not reflect optionality.
